goal: Configure a Franka work cell with a safety zone partition: setup_zone_partition defines an exclusion volume around the robot work area; add_proximity_sensor detects a simulated human-entry prim entering that volume; teleop_safety_config sets watchdog timeout and joint-velocity cap; set_clearance_monitor arms a near-miss alert on the robot links. When the human prim crosses the zone boundary the robot motion inhibit fires and velocity targets zero. Exercises the safety-stop / zone-inhibit pattern — structurally distinct from all sort, pick-place, rl-train, and SDG canonicals.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-zone-partition-safety:

1) Pattern gap: no existing canonical exercises the zone-inhibit safety workflow. setup_zone_partition + teleop_safety_config + set_clearance_monitor is a distinct 3-tool chain unused elsewhere in the library.

2) Scene geometry:
   - Robot base at [0, 0, 0.75] (on table). Franka reach ~0.85m.
   - Zone exclusion volume: 1.0m cube centred at [0, 0, 1.15] — covers the full robot work envelope.
   - Zone boundary for conveyor side is y=+0.45; human entry prim starts at [0, 1.0, 0.9] (outside) and moves to [0, 0.40, 0.9] (inside zone) to trigger stop.

3) setup_zone_partition in _models.py takes conveyor_path, n_zones, robots — here we repurpose n_zones=1 (single exclusion zone for one robot). The zone is the whole cell; n_zones=1 means one zone, one robot.

4) teleop_safety_config: watchdog_timeout_ms=200 (aggressive for safety demo), max_joint_velocity=0.5 rad/s, workspace_limits aligned with zone volume.

5) set_clearance_monitor: clearance_mm=80 (warning zone 150 mm). target_prims include the human prim and any furniture in the cell.

6) register_moving_obstacle registers the human prim so cuRobo replanning avoids it dynamically.

7) visualize_clearance mode='zones' creates visible trigger volumes for debug rendering.

8) Human entry prim is a simple Capsule (/World/HumanProxy) with a RigidBody so physics moves it. We animate entry by setting linear_velocity toward the zone at sim_control step.

9) Physics: CPU dynamics for determinism. sleepThreshold=0.0 on HumanProxy.

10) Verified_status: drafted only — function gate requires Kit RPC round-trip to confirm inhibit fires.
code:
# ── Ground and lighting ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight", intensity=900.0)
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Ground",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, 0, -0.5],
    scale=[20, 20, 1],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics: CPU dynamics for determinism ─────────────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(
    config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"}
)

# ── Robot mounting table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Table",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, 0, 0.375],
    scale=[0.7, 0.7, 0.375],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Franka arm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Base at z=0.75 (table top). Faces +Y.
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── Safety zone partition ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# n_zones=1: one exclusion zone for the Franka cell.
# conveyor_path reused as cell_boundary prim; robots list ties zone to Franka.
setup_zone_partition(
    conveyor_path="/World/Table",
    n_zones=1,
    robots=["/World/Franka"],
)

# ── Human-proxy prim (simulated intruder) ─────────────────────────────────────
# Capsule 1.75m tall, starts OUTSIDE the zone at y=1.0m.
# Will be moved into zone (y=0.40) to trigger safety stop.
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/HumanProxy",
    prim_type="Capsule",
    position=[0, 1.0, 0.9],
)
set_attribute(
    prim_path="/World/HumanProxy",
    attr_name="height",
    value=1.75,
)
set_attribute(
    prim_path="/World/HumanProxy",
    attr_name="radius",
    value=0.25,
)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/HumanProxy", schema_name=api)
set_attribute(
    prim_path="/World/HumanProxy",
    attr_name="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)

# ── Proximity sensor — zone boundary ─────────────────────────────────────────
# 1.0m cube volume centred at [0, 0.45, 1.15]; any HumanProxy overlap triggers.
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/ZoneBoundarySensor",
    position=[0, 0.45, 1.15],
    size=[1.0, 0.10, 1.5],
    watched_path_pattern="/World/HumanProxy",
)

# ── Register human proxy as moving obstacle for cuRobo replanning ─────────────
register_moving_obstacle(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    obstacle_path="/World/HumanProxy",
)

# ── Safety configuration ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# watchdog_timeout_ms=200: robot zeroes velocity 200 ms after last command.
# max_joint_velocity=0.5 rad/s: conservative cap during human-present operation.
# workspace_limits: AABB centred on robot, ±0.9m X/Y, 0.75–1.70m Z.
teleop_safety_config(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    watchdog_timeout_ms=200,
    max_joint_velocity=0.5,
    workspace_limits={
        "x_min": -0.90, "x_max": 0.90,
        "y_min": -0.90, "y_max": 0.90,
        "z_min":  0.75, "z_max": 1.70,
    },
)

# ── Clearance monitor on robot links ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Warning zone 150 mm; stop zone 80 mm. target_prims: human proxy + table.
set_clearance_monitor(
    articulation_path="/World/Franka",
    clearance_mm=80.0,
    warning_mm=150.0,
    target_prims=["/World/HumanProxy", "/World/Table"],
)

# ── Visualize clearance zones (debug rendering) ───────────────────────────────
visualize_clearance(
    articulation_path="/World/Franka",
    mode="zones",
    target_prims=["/World/HumanProxy", "/World/Table"],
    clearance_mm=80.0,
    warning_mm=150.0,
)

# ── Start simulation; human proxy walks into zone to trigger stop ─────────────
sim_control(action="play")
# Move human proxy toward robot zone: set velocity toward y=0.40 (inside zone).
set_linear_velocity(
    prim_path="/World/HumanProxy",
    velocity=[0, -0.30, 0],
)
# At ~2 s the proxy crosses y=0.45 boundary. ZoneBoundarySensor fires;
# teleop_safety_config watchdog causes Franka velocity targets to zero.
code_template:
# ── Ground and lighting ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight", intensity=900.0)
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Ground",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, 0, -0.5],
    scale=[20, 20, 1],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics: CPU dynamics for determinism ─────────────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(
    config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"}
)

# ── Robot mounting table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Table",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, 0, 0.375],
    scale=[0.7, 0.7, 0.375],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Robot arm ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="{{primary_robot.class}}",
    dest_path="{{primary_robot.path}}",
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── Safety zone partition ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
setup_zone_partition(
    conveyor_path="/World/Table",
    n_zones=1,
    robots=["{{primary_robot.path}}"],
)

# ── Human-proxy prim (simulated intruder) ─────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path="{{human_proxy.path}}",
    prim_type="Capsule",
    position={{human_proxy.initial_position}},
)
set_attribute(prim_path="{{human_proxy.path}}", attr_name="height", value=1.75)
set_attribute(prim_path="{{human_proxy.path}}", attr_name="radius",  value=0.25)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="{{human_proxy.path}}", schema_name=api)
set_attribute(prim_path="{{human_proxy.path}}", attr_name="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)

# ── Proximity sensor — zone boundary ─────────────────────────────────────────
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/ZoneBoundarySensor",
    position=[0, 0.45, 1.15],
    size=[1.0, 0.10, 1.5],
    watched_path_pattern="{{human_proxy.path}}",
)

# ── Register human proxy as moving obstacle ───────────────────────────────────
register_moving_obstacle(
    robot_path="{{primary_robot.path}}",
    obstacle_path="{{human_proxy.path}}",
)

# ── Safety configuration ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
teleop_safety_config(
    robot_path="{{primary_robot.path}}",
    watchdog_timeout_ms=200,
    max_joint_velocity=0.5,
    workspace_limits={
        "x_min": -0.90, "x_max": 0.90,
        "y_min": -0.90, "y_max": 0.90,
        "z_min":  0.75, "z_max": 1.70,
    },
)

# ── Clearance monitor on robot links ─────────────────────────────────────────
set_clearance_monitor(
    articulation_path="{{primary_robot.path}}",
    clearance_mm=80.0,
    warning_mm=150.0,
    target_prims=["{{human_proxy.path}}", "/World/Table"],
)

# ── Visualize clearance zones ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
visualize_clearance(
    articulation_path="{{primary_robot.path}}",
    mode="zones",
    target_prims=["{{human_proxy.path}}", "/World/Table"],
    clearance_mm=80.0,
    warning_mm=150.0,
)

# ── Play and trigger entry ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
sim_control(action="play")
set_linear_velocity(
    prim_path="{{human_proxy.path}}",
    velocity=[0, -0.30, 0],
)
failure_modes: setup_zone_partition conveys conveyor_path — the schema uses conveyor_path as cell boundary anchor; pass a rigid-body prim (Table) that exists before the call, not the robot path itself.
teleop_safety_config only active during a teleop session — if no start_teleop_session was called first, watchdog has no effect; for pure sim safety use set_clearance_monitor event alone.
HumanProxy capsule may tunnel through zone boundary at high velocity — keep velocity <= 0.5 m/s and step dt small (default 1/60 s is fine).
register_moving_obstacle requires cuRobo planner to be initialised first — ensure setup_pick_place_controller or equivalent was called before registering the obstacle.
visualize_clearance mode='zones' requires render context — headless runs should skip or use mode='heatmap' which only tags attributes without rendering.
